name: table-cells-badges
description: A table cell container that embeds a klp Badge (or Status-badge) instance. Two display types: 'badge' (text pill with branded border/fill) and 'status' (icon-only pill with semantic info styling). Two height modes (1 = single row / hug; 2 = double row / extra padding) and six width presets (100, 150-auto, 200, 300, 400, square).
